title: DC Office Chikkaballapur – Civil Servants – 169 Posts

basic_details.job_title: DC Office Chikkaballapur Civil Servants Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for 169 Posts
basic_details.short_information: DC Office Chikkaballapur Recruitment 2026: 169 Civil Servants vacancies. Apply Offline from 01 May to 20 May 2026 at chikkaballapurcity.mrc.gov.in.
basic_details.organization_name: Urban Local Bodies (City Municipal Councils) of Chikkaballapur District
basic_details.application_mode: Offline only - Application form to be obtained from and submitted at the respective City Municipal Council office

qualification.education_qualification: Must be able to speak Kannada (Kannada Maatanaadalu Barabeku). No formal educational qualification specified.

salary_details.pay_scale: As per Minimum Wages Act, Labour Department (revised periodically); PF and ESI benefits provided

selection_process: Based on priority category (previous outsourced/daily wage/contract Pourakarmika experience - minimum 1 year)
how_to_apply: Candidates shall apply offline only using the prescribed application form. No online application mode is available. The application form is to be obtained from and submitted - along with all required documents - at the office of the respective City Municipal Council (Nagarasabhe) where the vacancy exists.
